events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: field service, bearings & seals, observed condition: mechanical seal face contamination from bare-hand touch. Work staged. Need select correct tool/material/replacement approach and explain why observed choice is wrong. Observed choice: bare-hand touch of seal face causing contamination. Correct: use clean lint-free gloves, clean handling, avoid touching lapped seal faces; use clean packaging, solvents, lint-free wipes; if contaminated, replace/clean per OEM. Decision fail because non-compliant, risk high/critical? Mechanical seal face contamination can cause leakage, premature failure, safety/environmental. Component condition installed-defective (contaminated). Need fill JSON fields. Let's craft.
